description_long: This is a futuristic police car with a sleek, angular body finished in a dark blue color, featuring stylized Japanese kanji characters on the hood. The vehicle is equipped with prominent, reinforced wheel covers and side-mounted mechanical components, suggesting advanced technology or weaponry. The windows are tinted black, and the roof is adorned with aerodynamic fins and a central device, possibly a sensor or communication module. The rear of the car displays a louvered engine cover and a wide, segmented taillight array. The overall design is reminiscent of a cyberpunk or sci-fi aesthetic, with subtle wear and markings indicating urban use. The car's exterior is mostly metallic, with some plastic and rubber elements visible on the wheels and trim.
description: A dark blue, futuristic police car with Japanese kanji on the hood, reinforced wheels, and cyberpunk styling. It features tinted windows, mechanical side components, and a louvered rear engine cover.
description_view_0: Front view shows the kanji characters on the hood, reinforced wheel covers, and a wide, flat front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular body, side-mounted mechanical components, and blue wheel covers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the louvered engine cover, segmented taillights, and the car's aerodynamic rear profile.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mechanical side details and blue wheel covers.
attribute_police_markings: White Japanese kanji characters are prominently displayed on the hood. There are no visible English 'POLICE' markings, department names, or checkered stripes.
